data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a recipient signature for high-value items, as stated in the linked use case. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the implementation or testing of this functionality. The absence of API reads or persisted state checks means that the requirement is not satisfied, leading to a clear gap in the validation process.
gaps: No evidence of recipient signature capture functionality for high-value items.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract for signature capture
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the recipient signature requirement for high-value items.
